```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement few-shot and zero-shot learning techniques"
---
# Few-Shot Learning
## Task
Implement few-shot and zero-shot learning for low-data scenarios.
## Requirements
1. Design effective few-shot prompts. 2. Select diverse and representative examples.
3. Implement semantic similarity for example selection. 4. Test with varying shot counts.
5. Compare against fine-tuned baselines.
## Constraints
- Minimize examples while maximizing quality. Dynamic example selection from pool.
## Success Criteria
- Few-shot matches fine-tuned for simple tasks. Example selection improves accuracy.
```
